case_title: KONSTANTIN SOLODUKHIN et al VS. WAI TAK POON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,971.05 FILED BY SOLODUKHIN, KONSTANTIN SOLODUKHIN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT POON, WAI TAK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLODUKHIN, KONSTANTIN SOLODUKHIN, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POON, WAI TAK $2,590.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.50, THE COURT DETERMINING PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5181 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOSS OF USE, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT POON, WAI TAK
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT POON, WAI TAK
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLTFF'S CLAIM & ORDER. HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
